name: Privilege Context Switching Error
description: The product does not properly manage privileges while switching between different contexts that have different privileges or spheres of control. A user could gain another user's privileges in an alternate context, such as a browser executing code in an unsafe security zone or back-button navigation bypassing authentication.
detection_pattern: Look for AUTH nodes (privilege context, security zone, session identity) that transition between CONTROL nodes (different security contexts, privilege domains, trust boundaries) without a CONTROL mediator (privilege re-evaluation, context isolation, identity re-verification) that ensures the correct privilege level is enforced in the new context.
